remarks: Sampling was interrupted by equipment failure. Bulk chemistry and Leaf area mass samples were collected on 20190904 (the next day).

scientificName: Quercus hemisphaerica W. Bartram ex Willd.

remarks: Mostly Paspalum notatum plus a few legume species.
Collected specimen for identification. Identification was Carya tomentosa according to Weakley Flora of the Southeastern Coastal Plain 2017 but could be hybrid.
